linting.notes: Linting is enforced via pre-commit hooks. The main linter is ruff for Python code. Shellcheck validates bash scripts. All linters run in CI via GitHub Actions pre-commit workflow.

setup_required: Set environment variables: IMAGE_NAME, GITHUB_SHA, VLLM_INFERENCE_MODEL, EMBEDDING_MODEL, VLLM_URL, POSTGRES_HOST, POSTGRES_PORT, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD
testing.mock_patterns: Tests use real external services (vLLM, PostgreSQL, Vertex AI, OpenAI)
testing.notes: Tests are integration tests that require: (1) pre-built container image, (2) running vLLM server with a model, (3) running PostgreSQL database, (4) docker/podman to run containers. Smoke tests (smoke.sh) verify basic functionality. Integration tests (run_integration_tests.sh) run pytest from upstream llama-stack repository. Tests cannot run without complete infrastructure.

ci.notes: CI runs on pull_request and push to main. Pre-commit checks (linting) must pass. Containerfile must be auto-generated (no manual edits). Container must build for both amd64 and arm64. Smoke tests and integration tests run with vLLM, PostgreSQL, and optionally Vertex AI and OpenAI. Tekton pipelines build multi-arch containers for OpenShift/Konflux.

build.build_command: pre-commit run --all-files (generates Containerfile); docker build -f distribution/Containerfile -t llama-stack:test .
build.notes: The Containerfile is auto-generated by distribution/build.py which is run via pre-commit hook. The build.py script installs llama-stack and generates dependency lists. Never edit Containerfile directly - only edit Containerfile.in template. Pre-commit must be run to regenerate Containerfile after any changes to config.yaml or Containerfile.in.

conventions.notes: Tests are bash-based integration tests, not unit tests. Python code is minimal (build scripts). Shell scripts follow shellcheck standards. PR titles must follow semantic commit conventions (enforced by semantic-pr workflow).

lint_commands.notes: Passed - no Python lint violations found

test_commands.notes: Cannot validate - requires pre-built container image, vLLM server, PostgreSQL database, and docker/podman runtime
Cannot validate - requires pre-built container image, vLLM server, PostgreSQL database, and clones upstream llama-stack repo to run pytest

container_recipe.notes: Linting commands work in isolated container. Tests require extensive infrastructure: container build, vLLM inference server, PostgreSQL database, and optionally cloud services (Vertex AI, OpenAI). The distribution/build.py script requires llama-stack installation and cannot be validated without external dependencies.
